FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class HyperlinkButton

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

A WinUI HyperlinkButton: accent-colored link text with a subtle hover/press surface and a HAND cursor (WinUI sets MouseCursorHand at initialize — dxaml\xcp\dxaml\lib\HyperLinkButton_Partial.cpp:28-34). Raises a click (in-app navigation); pass navigateUri to additionally launch the OS default handler after Click, exactly WinUI's OnClick order (Click event first, then Launcher::TryInvokeLauncher — HyperLinkButton_Partial.cpp:149-177) via the IPlatformApp.OpenUri PAL seam (host-wired through OpenUri; headless records). Underline: WinUI 3 sets the HyperlinkUnderlineVisible resource to FALSE (controls\dev\CommonStyles\Hyperlink_themeresources.xaml:20), and HyperlinkButton only underlines when that directive is true OR a HighContrast theme is active (HyperLinkButton_Partial.cpp:207-212) — so the WinUI 3 default is NO underline; UnderlineVisible is the opt-in (the E8 HighContrast pass forces it on). Style source: controls\dev\CommonStyles\HyperlinkButton_themeresources.xaml (Default = dark :4-18, Light :19-33).

public static class HyperlinkButton

Fields

PartLabel

The link text — a TextEl, so customize via parts.Set<TextEl>(HyperlinkButton.PartLabel, …). Owned: none (the accent foreground ramp and the Underline opt-in are style-driven; a modifier may override them).

public const string PartLabel = "Label"

Field Value

string

PartRoot

The link surface. Owned: OnClick (Click → OpenUri order), Role, Children (the label slot).

public const string PartRoot = "Root"

Field Value

string

Methods

Create(string, Action, Style?, bool, TemplateParts?)

A link that raises onClick (in-app navigation).

public static BoxEl Create(string text, Action onClick, HyperlinkButton.Style? style = null, bool isEnabled = true, TemplateParts? parts = null)

Parameters

text string
onClick Action
style HyperlinkButton.Style
isEnabled bool
parts TemplateParts

Returns

BoxEl

Create(string, string, Style?, bool, Action?, TemplateParts?)

A link with a WinUI NavigateUri: raises Click first, then launches navigateUri in the OS default handler (browser/mail) — WinUI's exact OnClick order (Click → Launcher::TryInvokeLauncher, HyperLinkButton_Partial.cpp:166-173) through the IPlatformApp.OpenUri PAL seam. Headless hosts record the URI instead of launching (HeadlessPlatformApp.OpenedUris).

public static BoxEl Create(string text, string navigateUri, HyperlinkButton.Style? style = null, bool isEnabled = true, Action? onClick = null, TemplateParts? parts = null)

Parameters

text string
navigateUri string
style HyperlinkButton.Style
isEnabled bool
onClick Action
parts TemplateParts

Returns

BoxEl
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
